trade.summary: Bilateral trade centered on automotive and electronics sectors. Thailandia exports electronic components, rubber, and automotive parts to Messico's manufacturing sector; Messico exports vehicles, auto parts, and fresh produce to Thailandia. Both countries compete in some automotive supply chain segments.

diplomatic.summary: Normal diplomatic relations maintained since 1975. Both countries cooperate in APEC and multilateral trade forums. Limited direct high-level engagement. Diplomatic ties are functional but not particularly active.

military.summary: No bilateral military relationship. Thailandia has Stati Uniti security ties while Messico is non-aligned.

financial.summary: Limited bilateral investment. Some Thai automotive component manufacturers supply Messico's assembly plants. Investment flows are primarily channeled through third countries.

energy.summary: Minimal direct energy trade. Both countries are net energy importers for some fuels. PTT (Thai state oil) and Pemex have no significant bilateral arrangements.

scientific.summary: Modest academic links. Some cooperation in agriculture, food science, and marine biology through APEC science frameworks.
